title: Untitled
content:
AI can generate code, but it doesn't fully understand the business context or the user's exact needs. My strength is combining technical skills with problem-solving and converting ideas into working products. I see AI as something that makes me more efficient, not something that replaces my contribution.


One thing I really like is that the office location is very convenient for me, so commuting won't be an issue and I can be available consistently.

AI can generate code, but it doesn't fully understand the business context or the user's exact needs. My strength is combining technical skills with problem-solving and converting ideas into working products. I see AI as something that makes me more efficient, not something that replaces my contribution.

enjoy understanding problems and discussing solutions, but I get the most satisfaction from actually building those solutions. I like coding, experimenting, and seeing my ideas turn into a working product. That's why I'm more inclined toward a technical role than a pure consulting role
